zh.of Yeardsley,Cheshire,England: 英國英格蘭爾也亞斯利

zh.of Yeardsley, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾也亞斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire於1371年1月9日出生在英國越可爾約克時，他的父親William Jodrell30歲，母親Agnes DeBradshaw28歲。他於1395年與Joan Assheton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1423年10月在英國爾塔可薩爾享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾塔可薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire于1371年1月9日出生在英国越可爾約克时，他的父亲William Jodrell30岁，母亲Agnes DeBradshaw28岁。他于1395年与Joan Assheton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1423年10月在英国爾塔可薩爾享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾塔可薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Jodrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Jaundrill
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Middle English * jaunerel ( jaune ‘yellow’ + suffix -erel, of Anglo-Norman origin), for someone with a yellowish complexion, possibly suffering from jaundice. For the -d-, compare the word jaundice, from Old French jaunice. The variant Jod(e)rell may have arisen through misreading Jandrell as * Jaudrell. Note William Jawdrell, 1448 in PROB 11, whose name may be an early form of Jodrell or a misreading of Jaundrell.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Jerdez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Wayle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gail .  The popularity of this form was no doubt increased by the fame of the American film actress  Gayle Hunnicutt  (  b. 1943 ).

variants.name: Gail
meanings: Shortened form of   Abigail .  It was not found as an independent given name before the middle of the 20th century; it became popular in the 1950s and 1960s, but has since fallen out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire was born on 9 January 1371, in York, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Jodrell, was 30 and his mother, Agnes DeBradshaw, was 28. He married Joan Assheton in 1395. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in October 1423, in Taxal, Cheshire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Taxal, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire est né le 9 janvier 1371, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Jodrell, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes DeBradshaw, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan Assheton en 1395. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en octobre 1423, à Taxal, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Taxal, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire am 9. Januar 1371 in York, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Jodrell 30 und seine Mutter Agnes DeBradshaw 28. Er hat 1395 Joan Assheton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb im Oktober 1423 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Taxal, Cheshire, England und wurde in Taxal, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire è nato il il 9 gennaio 1371 nel York, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Jodrell, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnes DeBradshaw, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joan Assheton nel 1395. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel ottobre 1423, nel Taxal, Cheshire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Taxal, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquireが1371年1月9日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで生まれた時，父William Jodrellは30歳，母Agnes DeBradshawは28歳であった。1395年にJoan Asshetonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1423年10月にイギリスチェシュアイアタクサルで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアタクサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire(이)가 1371년 1월 9일 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Jodrell(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes DeBradshaw(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1395년 Joan Assheton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1423년 10월 영국 체실르 타스앨에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 타스앨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1371, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Jodrell, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes DeBradshaw, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Assheton em 1395. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1423, em Taxal, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Taxal, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire родился 9 января 1371 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Jodrell было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes DeBradshaw, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Assheton в 1395 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер октябрь 1423 г. в местности таксаль, чешир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности таксаль, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger of Jerdez Wayle Jodrell Esquire nació el 9 de enero de 1371, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Jodrell, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes DeBradshaw, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joan Assheton en 1395. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en octubre de 1423, en Taxal, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Taxal, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
